name: Swedish Nut Cake
recipeIngredient: 20 oz can Crushed Pineapple (Use all pineapple and juice)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients together except for the icing ingredients.
2. Bake in a 9 x 13 inch greased pan, for 30 to 40 minutes at 350 degrees Fahrenheit or until tested with a toothpick.
3. Mix together until spreading consistency.
4. Spread on warm cake.
